Author's note:

Bro. When I saw that I got the okay to make this, I rushed so fast. I hope you find this as comforting and funny as I did, because Black Butler makes me so happy.. despite the topic of the show

Also, the random message is the scenario. I was trying to shove my Inspiration message into the preview text but it wasn't working like it should! >:(
